text: Galatians 2:20, I have been crucified with Christ.

I have been crucified with Christ. It is no longer I who live, but Christ lives in me. And the life which I now live in the flesh, I live by faith in the Son of God who loved me and gave himself for me.
He walked into church wearing leathers and everyone looked over their shoulders wondering what he was all about, and we missed an opportunity to love him to Jesus.
Is the harvest ready? What is the problem? The laborers. The harvest is all around us.
Submit to Christ and allow Christ to live in you, the hope of glory.
Allow Christ to live in you and work through you and you will fulfill the law of Christ.
